center.name: 卡庫姆國家公園
center.summary: 卡庫姆國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Red-tailed greenbul、Splendid starling，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-tailed greenbul (Criniger calurus), also known as the red-tailed bulbul, is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae, native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: 07, 2014.jpg | image_caption = At Kakum National Park, Ghana | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Lamprotornis | species = splendidus | authority = (Vieillot, 1822) | synonyms = | range_map = Verbreitungsgebiet Prachtglanzstar (Lamprotornis splendidus).png | range_map_caption = native range in green }} The splendid starling (Lamprotornis splendidus), also known as the splendid glossy-starling, is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae
